search_document:
User Request: Employees hired each year.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Employees Hired by Year
Type: chart
Description: Trend of employees hired each year
Title: Employee Count by Region
Type: table
Description: Number of employees in each region
Title: Total Employees
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of employees in the organization

sql_queries.title: Employees Hired by Year
sql_queries.description: Trend of employees hired each year
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', HireDate) AS HireYear, COUNT(EmployeeID) AS EmployeeCount FROM Employees GROUP BY HireYear ORDER BY HireYear

sql_queries.title: Employee Count by Region
sql_queries.description: Number of employees in each region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(EmployeeID) AS EmployeeCount FROM Employees GROUP BY Region

sql_queries.title: Total Employees
sql_queries.description: Total number of employees in the organization
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(EmployeeID) AS TotalEmployees FROM Employees
